title: Oracle Transactional Event Queue Message
description: Represents a message in Oracle Transactional Event Queues (TxEventQ), the Kafka-compatible event streaming system built into Oracle Database.

key.description: Message key used for partition assignment and ordering guarantees

value.description: The message payload content, can be any JSON value

headers.description: Optional message headers for metadata and routing

offset.description: Sequential offset of the message within its partition

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was produced or appended
